query: UPDATE sms_balance SET balance = balance + 0.30 WHERE establishmentId = 30001; INSERT INTO sms_transactions (establishmentId, type, amount, smsCount, balanceBefore, balanceAfter, description, createdAt) VALUES (30001, 'credit', 0.30, 0, 0.00, 0.30, 'Recarga manual de créditos SMS', NOW());
